title: Faq
sectionSubtitle: Got Questions? We've Got You Covered
sectionText: From work planning to final touches, we've answered the most common questions to help you make informed decisions.

faqData.question: What types of projects do you handle?
answer: We carry out a wide range of construction, renovation, restoration, and maintenance works.
This includes masonry, structural repairs, painting, and outdoor improvements for residential properties.

faqData.question: Do you provide free estimates?
answer: Yes, we offer free consultations and estimates after assessing the scope of the project.
This allows us to provide clear pricing and realistic timelines.

faqData.question: How long will my project take?
answer: The duration depends on the size and complexity of the work.
After reviewing the details, we provide a clear schedule and keep you informed throughout the process.

faqData.question: Do you help with planning and material selection?
answer: Yes, we assist with project planning and help you choose suitable, durable materials.

If required, we can also take care of the entire process — from selecting and ordering the necessary materials to arranging their delivery to the site — ensuring everything is ready for the work to proceed smoothly.

faqData.question: Can you handle a project from start to finish?
answer: Yes, we can manage your project from start to finish, taking care of every stage to ensure consistent quality and timely completion.

faqData.question: How do I get started?
answer: Simply contact us to discuss your project.
We will arrange a site visit, review your requirements, and provide a detailed estimate.
